column8: Brown, gravelly silty medium to coarse SAND. (FILL)
Angular Cobbles and Gravels of moderately decomposed granite with some brown, silty SAND and some red bricks and concrete fragments. (FILL)
Sub-rounded Boulders, Cobbles and Gravels of moderately decomposed granite and tuff with some brown, silty SAND. (ALLUVIUM) No recovery 19.80-20.10m.

Moderately weak to moderately strong, brownish pink spotted black and white, moderately decomposed medium to coarse grained GRANITE with widely to medium spaced and occasionally closely spaced, very narrow to extremely narrow, rough planar, limonite, manganese, kaolin and iron stained joints, dipping 10 degrees-20 degrees, 70 degrees-80 degrees.
Weak to moderately weak, brownish pink spotted black and white, highly to moderately decomposed medium to coarse granite GRANITE.

Moderately weak to moderately strong, brownish pink spotted black and white, moderately decomposed medium to coarse grained GRANITE with widely to medium spaced and occasionally closely spaced, very narrow to extremely narrow, rough planar, limonite, manganese, kaolin and iron stained joints, dipping 10 degrees-20 degrees, 70 degrees-80 degrees.
